serviceDescription: Connects your domain to NeevJob ATS so your AI recruiting agent can send and receive emails on your behalf.

variables.name: dkim_value
variables.description: DKIM public key value provided by Resend for this domain

records.comment: Inbound MX — routes incoming emails on the agent subdomain to Resend for AI agent processing
DKIM — Resend public key for email authenticity. Unique per tenant, injected at runtime via Resend API.
SPF for outbound — authorises Amazon SES (used by Resend) to send on behalf of send.agent subdomain
Bounce/feedback MX — Amazon SES receives delivery notifications for outbound emails sent via Resend
DMARC — policy for handling unauthenticated emails. rua address dynamically set to tenant domain.
records.data: v=DMARC1; p=none; rua=mailto:dmarc@%domain%; fo=1; adkim=r; aspf=r
